name: Gmail Urgency Flagging Agent
description: Search Gmail inbox, AI-classify each email as urgent/not, filter to urgent, scatter_gather per urgent email to mark IMPORTANT + apply tracking label via modify_email, project to summary fields, AI generate HTML summary email, send summary. Tests Gmail-only flow (no Sheets), AI classification at scale, scatter_gather over an action chain (modify_email twice per item — IMPORTANT label + tracking label), and label-aware modify_email.
